name: HRA_TMPL_SEC_ITEMS
description: This table stores all items applicable to a template section. For example, an FY07 appraisal template contains a Competency section which has Java Skills and Communication Skills as competency items.

columns.Name: ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the Template Section Items.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: SECTION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key of Template Sections.

columns.Name: PARENT_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: This field indicates the parent item.

columns.Name: CONTENT_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: This field contains the content item id of the content item in content library in profile mgmt.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: Template Section Item name.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: This is the description of the content item, from the content library.

columns.Name: MEASUREMENT
columns.Comments: This is the measurement criterion for the item

columns.Name: TARGET_PROF_REV_RATING_ID
columns.Comments: This is the target proficiency rating for the item.

columns.Name: TARGET_PERF_REV_RATING_ID
columns.Comments: This is the target performance rating for the item.

columns.Name: PROF_RATING_MODEL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the rating model for proficiency for each item

columns.Name: PERF_RATING_MODEL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the rating model for performance for the item.

columns.Name: DUE_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the due date for the item.

columns.Name: REMINDER_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the reminder date for the item.

columns.Name: OWNED_BY
columns.Comments: This field indicates the ownership and responsibility for a particular item.

columns.Name: MANDATORY_FLAG
columns.Comments: This field indicates that the item is mandatory and cannot be updated or deleted by any user, at the performance document.

columns.Name: CRITICAL_FLAG
columns.Comments: This field indicates that the item is critical, at the performance document.  Critical status serves to highlight the item to the worker and the manager, but there is no other processing around the Critical flag.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: WEIGHT
columns.Comments: This is the weight of the item.

columns.Name: MIN_WEIGHT
columns.Comments: This is the minimum weight of the item.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.
